--- title: "IMQMetadata class | @imqueue/rpc 3.2.1" --- {% raw %}

Home > @imqueue/rpc > IMQMetadata

IMQMetadata class

Arbitrary, JSON-serializable metadata bag carried alongside an IMQ request. Each property value must be a valid JSON value.

Signature:

export declare class IMQMetadata

Constructor

Modifiers

Description

(constructor)(metadata)

Constructs a new instance of the IMQMetadata class
